lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਲਾਈਅਨਿ ਤਿਤੈ ਲਗਦੀਆ ਨਹ ਖਿੰਜੋਤਾੜਾ ॥
lines.translit: jit laaeean titai lagadeea neh khinjotaarraa |
lines.english: Wherever I join them, there they are joined; they do not struggle against me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਇਛੀ ਸੋ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਦਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਵਾੜਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo ichhee so fal paaeidaa gur andar vaarraa |
lines.english: I obtain the fruits of my desires; the Guru has directed me within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਤੁਠਾ ਭਾਇਰਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਵਸਦਾ ਨੇੜਾ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: gur naanak tutthaa bhaaeirahu har vasadaa nerraa |10|
lines.english: When Guru Nanak is pleased, O Siblings of Destiny, the Lord is seen to be dwelling near at hand. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਮੂੰ ਆਵਹਿ ਚਿਤਿ ਤੂ ਤਾ ਹਭੇ ਸੁਖ ਲਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaa moon aaveh chit too taa habhe sukh lahaau |
lines.english: When You come into my consciousness, then I obtain all peace and comfort.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਪੜ ਭੋਗ ਵਿਕਾਰ ਏ ਹਭੇ ਹੀ ਛਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: kaparr bhog vikaar e habhe hee chhaar |
lines.english: Enjoyment of clothes and corrupt pleasures - all these are nothing more than dust.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨ ਹੀ ਮੰਝਿ ਰੰਗਾਵਲਾ ਪਿਰੀ ਤਹਿਜਾ ਨਾਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak man hee manjh rangaavalaa piree tahijaa naau |1|
lines.english: Nanak: with Your Name within my mind, O my Husband Lord, I am filled with delight. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਾਕੁ ਲੋੁੜੇਦਾ ਤੰਨਿ ਖੇ ਜੋ ਰਤੇ ਦੀਦਾਰ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: khaak lourredaa tan khe jo rate deedaar |2|
lines.english: I long for the dust of the feet of those who are imbued with the Lord's Vision. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਤਕਹਿ ਬਿਆ ਪਾਸ ਕਰਿ ਹੀਅੜੇ ਹਿਕੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa takeh biaa paas kar heearre hik adhaar |
lines.english: Why do you look in other directions? O my heart, take the Support of the Lord alone.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਥੀਉ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੀ ਰੇਣੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਲਭੀ ਸੁਖ ਦਾਤਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: theeo santan kee ren jit labhee sukh daataar |3|
lines.english: Become the dust of the feet of the Saints, and find the Lord, the Giver of peace. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਕਰਮਾ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਨੂਆ ਨ ਲਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: vin karamaa har jeeo na paaeeai bin satigur manooaa na lagai |
lines.english: Without good karma, the Dear Lord is not found; without the True Guru, the mind is not joined to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮੁ ਧੀਰਾ ਕਲਿ ਅੰਦਰੇ ਇਹੁ ਪਾਪੀ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਤਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: dharam dheeraa kal andare ihu paapee mool na tagai |
lines.english: Only the Dharma remains stable in this Dark Age of Kali Yuga; these sinners will not last at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹਿ ਕਰੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਅਹਿ ਕਰੁ ਪਾਏ ਇਕ ਘੜੀ ਮੁਹਤੁ ਨ ਲਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: eh kar kare su eh kar paae ik gharree muhat na lagai |
lines.english: Whatever one does with this hand, he obtains with the other hand, without a moment's delay.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰੇ ਜੁਗ ਮੈ ਸੋਧਿਆ ਵਿਣੁ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ਨ ਭਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: chaare jug mai sodhiaa vin sangat ahankaar na bhagai |
lines.english: I have examined the four ages, and without the Sangat, the Holy Congregation, egotism does not depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਛੁਟਈ ਵਿਣੁ ਸਾਧੂ ਸਤਸੰਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: haumai mool na chhuttee vin saadhoo satasangai |
lines.english: Egotism is never eradicated without the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਚਰੁ ਥਾਹ ਨ ਪਾਵਈ ਜਿਚਰੁ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਸਿਉ ਮਨ ਭੰਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: tichar thaah na paavee jichar saahib siau man bhangai |
lines.english: As long as one's mind is torn away from his Lord and Master, he finds no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਨਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਘਰਿ ਦੀਬਾਣੁ ਅਭਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: jin jan guramukh seviaa tis ghar deebaan abhagai |
lines.english: That humble being, who, as Gurmukh, serves the Lord, has the Support of the Imperishable Lord in the home of his heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਗੈ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: har kirapaa te sukh paaeaa gur satigur charanee lagai |11|
lines.english: By the Lord's Grace, peace is obtained, and one is attached to the feet of the Guru, the True Guru. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣਿਕੂ ਮੋਹਿ ਮਾਉ ਡਿੰਨਾ ਧਣੀ ਅਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: maanikoo mohi maau ddinaa dhanee apaeh |
lines.english: O my mother, the Master has blessed me with the jewel.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਠ ਮੰਝਾਹੂ ਸੋ ਧਣੀ ਚਉਦੋ ਮੁਖਿ ਅਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hatth manjhaahoo so dhanee chaudo mukh alaae |1|
lines.english: That Master is within my heart; I chant His Name with my mouth. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋੜੀਦੋ ਹਭ ਜਾਇ ਸੋ ਮੀਰਾ ਮੀਰੰਨ ਸਿਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: lorreedo habh jaae so meeraa meeran sir |
lines.english: I have searched everywhere for the King over the heads of kings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਆਉ ਮਹਿਜਾ ਠੰਢੜਾ ਮੁਖਹੁ ਸਚੁ ਅਲਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hiaau mahijaa tthandtarraa mukhahu sach alaae |2|
lines.english: My heart is cooled and soothed, chanting the True Name with my mouth. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂ ਥੀਆਊ ਸੇਜ ਨੈਣਾ ਪਿਰੀ ਵਿਛਾਵਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: moo theeaaoo sej nainaa piree vichhaavanaa |
lines.english: I have become the bed for my Beloved Husband Lord; my eyes have become the sheets.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਡੇਖੈ ਹਿਕ ਵਾਰ ਤਾ ਸੁਖ ਕੀਮਾ ਹੂ ਬਾਹਰੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: je ddekhai hik vaar taa sukh keemaa hoo baahare |3|
lines.english: If You look at me, even for an instant, then I obtain peace beyond all price. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਲੋਚੈ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਲਣ ਕਉ ਕਿਉ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: man lochai har milan kau kiau darasan paaeea |
lines.english: My mind longs to meet the Lord; how can I obtain the Blessed Vision of His Darshan?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਲਖ ਵਿੜਤੇ ਸਾਹਿਬਾ ਜੇ ਬਿੰਦ ਬੋੁਲਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: mai lakh virrate saahibaa je bind boulaaeea |
lines.english: I obtain hundreds of thousands, if my Lord and Master speaks to me, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਚਾਰੇ ਕੁੰਡਾ ਭਾਲੀਆ ਤੁਧੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਨ ਸਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: mai chaare kunddaa bhaaleea tudh jevadd na saaeea |
lines.english: I have searched in four directions; there is no other as great as You, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਅਰਪਿਹੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਤਜਹੁ ਇਤੁ ਪੰਥਿ ਜੁਲਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: man arapihu haumai tajahu it panth julaaeea |
lines.english: I dedicate my mind to Him, and renounce my ego. This is the Path which I shall take.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਦਸਿਹੁ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਸੰਤਹੋ ਕਿਉ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਮਿਲਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: mai dasihu maarag santaho kiau prabhoo milaaeea |
lines.english: Show me the Path, O Saints. How can I meet God?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਆਸਾ ਪੂਰੀਆ ਗੁਰ ਮਹਲਿ ਬੁਲਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe aasaa pooreea gur mehal bulaaeea |
lines.english: All my hopes are fulfilled; the Guru has ushered me into the Mansion of the Lord's Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਤ ਸੇਵਿਹੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਆਪਣਾ ਸਤਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਈਆ ॥
lines.translit: nit sevihu saahib aapanaa satasang milaaeea |
lines.english: Joining the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, I serve my Lord and Master continually.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਜੇਵਡੁ ਹੋਰੁ ਨ ਸੁਝਈ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਿਤ੍ਰ ਗੋੁਸਾਈਆ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: tudh jevadd hor na sujhee mere mitr gousaaeea |12|
lines.english: I cannot conceive of any other as great as You, O my Friend, O Lord of the World. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂ ਥੀਆਊ ਤਖਤੁ ਪਿਰੀ ਮਹਿੰਜੇ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹ ॥
lines.translit: moo theeaaoo takhat piree mahinje paatisaah |
lines.english: I have become the throne for my Beloved Lord King.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰੀਆ ਸੰਦੜੀ ਭੁਖ ਮੂ ਲਾਵਣ ਥੀ ਵਿਥਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: pireea sandarree bhukh moo laavan thee vitharaa |
lines.english: If my Beloved becomes hungry, I will become food, and place myself before Him.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਵ ਮਿਲਾਵੇ ਕੋਲਿ ਕਵਲ ਜਿਵੈ ਬਿਗਸਾਵਦੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: paav milaave kol kaval jivai bigasaavado |1|
lines.english: If You place Your foot on me, I blossom forth like the lotus flower. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਗਾ ਨੀਹੁ ਮਤ੍ਰੋੜਿ ਜਾਣੁ ਗੰਧ੍ਰਬਾ ਨਗਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: tthagaa neehu matrorr jaan gandhrabaa nagaree |
lines.english: Break off your love with the cheaters; realize that it is a mirage.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਣੁ ਮਿਠਾਈ ਇਖ ਬੇਈ ਪੀੜੇ ਨਾ ਹੁਟੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jaan mitthaaee ikh beee peerre naa huttai |2|
lines.english: I may be crushed, again and again, but like sugarcane, I do not stop yielding sweet juice. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਲ ਕਲਾ ਨਹ ਪਾਈਐ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਲਖ ਅਲੇਖੰ ॥
lines.translit: akal kalaa neh paaeeai prabh alakh alekhan |
lines.english: God is not found by intellectual devices; He is unknowable and unseen.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਘਟਾਊ ਡੂਇ ਇਸੁ ਪੰਧਾਣੂ ਘਰ ਘਣੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sukh ghattaaoo ddooe is pandhaanoo ghar ghane |3|
lines.english: Your pleasure lasts for only two moments; this traveller wanders through countless homes. ||3||
